raw_consumer_statement: I made a purchases from the an app on an XXXX, charged through apple. Some were never delivered and when I complained I was promised a refund and all were taken back, I was never given a refund. I tried to initiate charge backs but AMEX refused to let me open chargeback online and said to contact them. When Ive contacted them they refuse to start the chargebacks. XXXX pretty sure its just lazy customer support employees not wanting to do the work.
